title: Wire Hang Redux: update
summary: An update to Wire Hang Redux my version of the Java game Wire Hang, with improved controls and graphics. This version was built using BlitzMax. Read more about the game in the original blog post . Download: gingerbeardman.itch.io/wire-hang-redux
content:
An update to Wire Hang Redux my version of the Java game Wire Hang, with improved controls and graphics. This version was built using BlitzMax.

Read more about the game in the original blog post.

Download: gingerbeardman.itch.io/wire-hang-redux
